title: $:/plugins/rimir/core-hook
name: core hook
description: Unified settings hub for rimir plugins in the ControlPanel
author: rimir
text:

","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/core-hook/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/core-hook/README.md","text":"# Core Hook > Unified settings hub for rimir plugins in the ControlPanel ## Key features * **Dynamic discovery** -- automatically finds all installed `$:/plugins/rimir/*` plugins * **Vertical sidebar** -- plugin list with icons, names, and version badges * **Auto-discovery of settings** -- transcludes each plugin's `settings` tiddler as content panel * **Fallback panel** -- plugins without settings show an info card with link to documentation ## Prerequisites No external prerequisites. ## Quick start Install plugin. All rimir plugins with a `settings` tiddler automatically appear in ControlPanel > Settings > Rimi Plugins. ## Plugin Library Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*. ## Demo Try this plugin in the [live demo wiki](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-demo/). ## License MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md) ","type":"text/x-markdown"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/changelog","created":"20260305110506502","modified":"20260305110506502","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog |!Version |!Date |!Changes | |v0.1.7 |2026-04-07 |Fix settings panel transclude mode for proper wikitext block rendering | |v0.1.6 |2026-03-27 |Fix docs: typo in reference, expand file list in dev-workflow, add dual doc-path detail to architecture | |v0.1.5 |2026-03-27 |Fix default panel doc link: support both doc/overview and legacy doc-overview paths | |v0.1.4 |2026-03-15 |Add missing doc tiddlers (dev-workflow, examples, faq, reference, tw-internals) | |v0.1.3 |2026-03-15 |Add regression tests and CI test gate | |v0.1.2 |2026-03-06 |Lowercase plugin name in plugin.info | |v0.1.1 |2026-03-06 |Standardize plugin tabs: add documentation/changelog/license to list, replace license.tid with LICENSE.md.meta sidecar | |v0.1.0 |2026 |Initial release | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/controlpanel":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/controlpanel","caption":"Rimi Plugins","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","tags":"$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim
<$list filter="[plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]]"> <$let isActive={{{ [[$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected]get[text]matchthen[rr-settings-plugin-active]else[]] }}} classes={{{ [[rr-settings-plugin-item ]addsuffix] }}} > <$button class=<> set="$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected" setTo=<>> <$transclude $tiddler={{{ [addsuffix[/icon]] }}} size="16pt"/> <$text text={{{ [get[name]] ~[split[/]last[1]] }}}/> v<$text text={{{ [get[version]] }}}/>
<$let selected={{{ [[$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected]get[text]] ~[plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]first[]] }}} settingsTitle={{{ [addsuffix[/settings]] }}} >
<$transclude $tiddler={{{ [addsuffix[/icon]] }}} size="28pt"/>
<$text text={{{ [get[name]] ~[split[/]last[1]] }}}/>
<$text text={{{ [get[description]] }}}/>
<$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]title]" variable="panel"> <$transclude $tiddler=<> $mode="block"/> <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]title] +[count[]match[0]]" variable="ignore"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/default-panel"/>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/default-panel":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/default-panel","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim
This plugin has no configurable settings. <$let docTitle={{{ [addsuffix[/doc/overview]] }}} docTitleLegacy={{{ [addsuffix[/doc-overview]] }}} > <$list filter="[all[shadows+tiddlers]title] [all[shadows+tiddlers]title] +[first[]]" variable="doc"> <$link to=<>>Open documentation →
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin discovery The hub uses a single TW filter to find all rimir plugins: ``` [plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]] ``` This excludes `core-hook` itself from the sidebar list. !! State management Selected plugin is stored in `$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected`. If no selection exists, the filter auto-selects the first plugin alphabetically. The active sidebar item gets a `rr-settings-plugin-active` class via a `$let` + filter comparison. !! Settings resolution For the selected plugin `$:/plugins/rimir/`, the hub appends `/settings` and checks if that tiddler exists (across shadows + real tiddlers). If found, it transcludes the settings panel. If not, it falls back to `default-panel.tid`, which shows an info card and links to the plugin's documentation — checking both `doc/overview` and legacy `doc-overview` paths. !! Naming convention | !Pattern | !Purpose | | `$:/plugins/rimir//settings` | Settings panel (hub content + plugin detail tab) | | `$:/plugins/rimir//icon` | Plugin icon (sidebar + header) | !! CSS classes All styles use the `rr-settings-` prefix, defined in the theme plugin's `styles.tid`. The hub layout is a flex container with a fixed-width sidebar and flexible content area. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Plugin files |!File |!Role | |`controlpanel.tid` |Main hub UI — tagged `$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab`, renders sidebar + content layout | |`default-panel.tid` |Fallback panel shown when a plugin has no `settings` tiddler; links to doc/overview or legacy doc-overview | |`settings.tid` |core-hook's own settings entry (displays "no configurable settings" info card) | |`documentation.tid` |Documentation tab — transcludes doc/overview if doc-template is installed, otherwise fallback | |`readme.tid` |Plugin readme | |`changelog.tid` |Version history table | |`icon.tid` |SVG icon | |`plugin.info` |Plugin metadata | |`LICENSE.md` + `.meta` |MIT license (sidecar maps to `$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/license`) | |`README.md` |GitHub-facing readme | |`test/test-hub.tid` |Regression test — verifies sidebar renders plugin names and content area | |`doc/*.tid` |Doc-template documentation tiddlers (overview, architecture, dev-workflow, examples, faq, reference, tw-internals) | !! Restart rules |!Change |!Restart needed? | |Any `.tid` file |Yes — all files are plugin shadow tiddlers, require server restart to update | <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info"> <$fill $name="body"> core-hook is 100% wikitext — no JS modules. However, since all files are shadow tiddlers inside the plugin, a server restart is needed to pick up changes. Config changes via the browser UI take effect immediately. !! Adding a plugin to the hub To make your plugin appear in the settings hub: # Create a tiddler `$:/plugins/rimir//settings` inside your plugin directory # Add `"settings"` to the `list` field in `plugin.info` # Restart the server — the hub discovers the plugin automatically via the `$:/plugins/rimir/` prefix filter !! Dependencies * ''theme'' — CSS classes for the hub layout (`rr-settings-hub`, `rr-settings-sidebar`, `rr-settings-content`, etc.) "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/examples","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Opting a plugin into the settings hub Create a `settings.tid` inside your plugin with any UI content: ``` title: $:/plugins/rimir/my-plugin/settings type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki
<$edit-text tiddler="$:/config/rimir/my-plugin/endpoint" tag="input" class="rr-input"/>
``` The hub transcludes this tiddler automatically when the user selects your plugin in the sidebar. !! Plugin without settings If your plugin has no configurable settings, the hub shows a fallback info card with a link to the plugin's documentation. No action needed — the fallback is automatic. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/faq","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Q: My plugin doesn't appear in the settings hub. Why? The hub discovers plugins via the filter `[plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]]`. Check that: * Your plugin is listed in `tiddlywiki.info` under `plugins` * The plugin title starts with `$:/plugins/rimir/` * You restarted the server after adding the plugin Note that core-hook itself is excluded from the sidebar list. !! Q: Can I use the settings hub without the theme plugin? The hub layout depends on `rr-settings-*` CSS classes defined in the theme plugin. Without theme, the hub will render but without proper styling (no sidebar layout, no accent borders, no spacing). !! Q: How does the hub decide which plugin is selected by default? If no selection state exists in `$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected`, the hub auto-selects the first plugin alphabetically (via `sort[name]first[]`). "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview","created":"20260305110506503","modified":"20260305110506503","rdt.hub-category":"infrastructure","rdt.hub-category-name":"Infrastructure","rdt.hub-order":"1","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! What it does Adds a ''Rimi Plugins'' top-level tab to the ControlPanel. The tab shows a vertical sidebar listing all installed rimir plugins, with a content area that displays each plugin's settings panel or a default info card. !! Features * ''Dynamic discovery'' — automatically lists all plugins with title prefix `$:/plugins/rimir/` * ''Vertical sidebar'' — click any plugin to view its settings; active plugin highlighted with accent border * ''Auto-selection'' — first plugin selected on load (no blank content) * ''Fallback panel'' — plugins without settings show an info card with a link to documentation * ''Dual-purpose settings'' — the same `settings` tiddler appears both in the hub and in TW's built-in plugin detail view !! How plugins opt in Create a tiddler titled `$:/plugins/rimir//settings` inside your plugin. The hub transcludes it as the content panel. Add `"settings"` to the `list` field in `plugin.info` so TW's plugin info view also shows a settings tab. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/reference","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! Discovery filter ``` [plugin-type[plugin]prefix[$:/plugins/rimir/]!title[$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook]sort[name]] ``` Finds all installed rimir plugins except core-hook itself. !! State tiddler |!Tiddler |!Purpose | |`$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected` |Currently selected plugin title in the sidebar | !! Convention: settings tiddler |!Pattern |!Purpose | |`$:/plugins/rimir//settings` |Settings panel content — transcluded by the hub and shown in plugin detail view | !! Convention: icon tiddler |!Pattern |!Purpose | |`$:/plugins/rimir//icon` |SVG icon displayed in the sidebar and header (16pt sidebar, 28pt header) | !! CSS classes (from theme plugin) |!Class |!Purpose | |`rr-settings-hub` |Top-level flex container (sidebar + content) | |`rr-settings-sidebar` |Left sidebar with plugin list | |`rr-settings-plugin-item` |Clickable button for each plugin | |`rr-settings-plugin-active` |Highlighted state (accent left border) | |`rr-settings-plugin-name` |Plugin name text (truncated) | |`rr-settings-plugin-version` |Version badge (muted) | |`rr-settings-content` |Right content area | |`rr-settings-header` |Plugin header with icon + name + description | |`rr-settings-info-card` |Dashed fallback card for plugins without settings | "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260315120000000","modified":"20260315120000000","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"core-hook","rdt.plugin-name":"core hook","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Unified settings hub for rimir plugins","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page"> <$fill $name="body"> !! $:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab The `controlpanel.tid` tiddler is tagged `$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab`, which makes it appear as a top-level tab in ControlPanel > Settings. TiddlyWiki's core ControlPanel uses `$list` with this tag to render settings tabs. !! plugin-type[plugin] filter The `plugin-type` field is set automatically by TiddlyWiki on all installed plugins. The hub uses this to discover rimir plugins without maintaining a manual list. !! Shadow tiddler resolution The hub checks for settings tiddlers using `[all[shadows+tiddlers]title]`. This searches both shadow tiddlers (bundled inside plugins) and real tiddlers (in the wiki store), ensuring the settings panel is found regardless of how the plugin delivers it. !! $let widget Used for computed CSS class assignment — the `isActive` variable compares the current iteration item against the stored selection state, and the `classes` variable concatenates the base class with the active modifier. !! State tiddler pattern `$:/state/rimir/core-hook/selected` follows TiddlyWiki's convention of using `$:/state/` prefix for UI state that is ephemeral and not synced to the server. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/documentation","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %> <$tiddler tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview"> <$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/doc/overview"/> <%else%> To display this documentation, the plugin [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]] needs to be installed. See the [[readme|$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/readme]] tab for a basic overview. <%endif%> "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/icon":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/icon","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"image/svg+xml","text":" "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/readme","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! core hook Unified settings hub for all rimir plugins. Adds a "Rimi Plugins" tab to ControlPanel > Settings with a vertical sidebar listing all installed rimir plugins and their settings. !! Key features * ''Dynamic discovery'' — automatically finds all installed `$:/plugins/rimir/*` plugins * ''Vertical sidebar'' — plugin list with icons, names, and version badges * ''Auto-discovery of settings'' — transcludes each plugin's `settings` tiddler as content panel * ''Fallback panel'' — plugins without settings show an info card with link to documentation !! Prerequisites No external prerequisites. !! Quick start Install plugin. All rimir plugins with a `settings` tiddler automatically appear in ControlPanel > Settings > Rimi Plugins. "},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/settings","created":"20260305110506504","modified":"20260305110506504","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"
No configurable settings. This plugin provides the settings hub framework.
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/test/test-hub":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/core-hook/test/test-hub","description":"Settings hub renders sidebar and content area","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki-multiple","tags":"[[$:/tags/wiki-test-spec]]","text":"title: $:/plugins/rimir/testplugin plugin-type: plugin name: test plugin version: 1.0.0 description: A test plugin type: application/json {"tiddlers":{}} + title: $:/plugins/rimir/testplugin/settings type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki Test settings content + title: Output \whitespace trim

"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/core-hook/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/core-hook/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info","text":"{ "description": "Test edition for core-hook", "plugins": [ "tiddlywiki/jasmine", "rimir/core-hook" ], "themes": [ "tiddlywiki/vanilla", "tiddlywiki/snowwhite" ] } ","type":".info"}}}
